notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias
support model counts one beneficiary and active-ability heals/shields only (passive heals, CC, and damage-reduction utility are not scored)
the sim opens on Oblivion Crown, which the field rarely builds (0.7% pick) — a sim-only call; compare the meta cores below

coachLine: Sim-optimal for heal/shield output: first spike lands around minute 15 (Oblivion Crown), third item by minute 29. Take Vesh: +13.5% on the damage rotation at minute 15.

all.name: Marrow
all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion
all.note: Aion (Major): economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

metaBuilds.title: Magical Bruiser (Physical-Def)
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 24 — about 133 auto-attack DPS in the sim.

metaBuilds.title: Magical Enchanter
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for heal/shield output, online around minute 24 — about 156 HP healed or shielded over 10s in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +61% more heal/shield output: try Oblivion Crown over Truesilver Bracelet (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.title: Magical Burst
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 24 — about 511 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +58% more one-combo burst: try Oblivion Crown over Truesilver Bracelet (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Zinx's main threat is Ricochet; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Spirit Of Amir: their 3s all-in loses 22% of its bite, at the cost of 16% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Dekker deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Spirit Of Amir: their 3s all-in loses 23% of its bite, at the cost of 14% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange. Phase's main threat is Energy Lance; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Spirit Of Amir: their 3s all-in loses 20% of its bite, at the cost of 15% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Riktor ramps on auto-attacks — pressure them before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spirit Of Amir: their 3s all-in loses 18% of its bite, at the cost of 14% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Adele deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Spirit Of Amir: their 3s all-in loses 31% of its bite, at the cost of 14% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange. Mourn's main threat is Abduct; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Spirit Of Amir: their 3s all-in loses 24% of its bite, at the cost of 15% of this kit's damage.

laneSteer.provenance: “Percussive Tear” ⇒ tank; the sim models this augment — field support 49.5% over 1,048 games.
